LanguageData.IC_GizmoSetThresholdDesc: Set the health percentage at which mechanoids will seek this repair station.
LanguageData.IC_GizmoPriorityDesc: Set the priority of this repair station. Mechanoids prefer stations with a lower priority number (1 = highest priority). Click to cycle through values 1–9.
LanguageData.IC_GizmoEjectOccupantDesc: Force the current mechanoid to leave the repair station.
LanguageData.IC_LetterRepairCompleteText: {0} has been fully repaired at the iron cradle.
LanguageData.IC_LetterNoSteelText: The iron cradle has run out of steel and cannot continue repairing {0}.
LanguageData.IC_StatRepairSpeedDesc: How quickly this station repairs mechanoid health per day.
